headline: FDA Expands Use Of Generic Drug To Treat Autism-Linked Genetic Disorder
summary: FDA approves expanded use of Wellcovorin tablets to treat cerebral folate deficiency linked to the FOLR1 gene in adults and children.

headline: UBS Raises Kenvue Inc. (KVUE) Price Target to $19 After Strong Q4 Results
summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) is among the 12 Low Price High Volume Stocks to Buy Right Now. On February 18, UBS raised the firm’s price target on Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) to $19 from $17 while maintaining a Neutral rating following fourth-quarter results that were better than expected. The same day, Canaccord Genuity increased its price target […]
